rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NORENA LEE WILSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final/Complete Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The copy of the supplemental inventory faxed to this Examiner does not indicate that the furnishings were appraised by the probate referee as required by the Probate Code. If the probate referee did appraise the furnishings, the signature page must be faxed to this Examiner. In addition, the supplemental inventory does not appear to have been filed.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE IVY GETTY IRREVOCABLE TRUST, U/A/D APRIL 23, 1996
rulings.Calendar Matter: Redacted Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Sealing (Original Doucment Filed Under Seal Pursuant To Court Order Filed July 28, 2011)
rulings.Rulings: Motion for Order Sealing Court Records is granted subject to the appointment of a guardian ad litem for the minor, Ivy Getty. The court will appoint a guardian ad litem for the minor. The purpose of the appointment is for the guardian ad litem to review the unredacted Petition for Order Modifying Trust and Confirming Actions of Predecessor Trustee prior to the August 29, 2011 hearing on said Petition. In addition, the guardian ad litem is further authorized to represent the minor on said Petition. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 no later than 4:00 p.m. on July 19, 2011.
